company_type: Financial Services - Credit Rating and Risk Assessment

risks: Dependence on third-party technology providers for software, data, hosted solutions, data centers, cloud and network infrastructure
Concentration of vendors for critical services
Risk of third-party service provider failures or security breaches
Migration risks from legacy systems to cloud-based solutions
Vendor cybersecurity incidents could significantly impact operations

ESMA supervision and periodic inspection in EU
FCA regulation in UK
Credit Rating Agency Reform Act of 2006 compliance
Dodd-Frank Act requirements
EU CRA regulation including procedural requirements for sovereign ratings

Ownership threshold restrictions in EU and UK
Hong Kong CRA regulations and code of conduct
China domestic CRA licensing requirements
Australia AFSL requirements for credit rating services
GDPR compliance in EU and UK
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and CPRA compliance
Data privacy laws in multiple US states

EU AI Act adopted 2024
UK ESG ratings regulation expected 2025
EU ESG Ratings Activities Regulation
Competition and Markets Authority review in UK
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act compliance
UK Bribery Act compliance
Economic and trade sanctions compliance
Anti-corruption laws in multiple jurisdictions
Antitrust regulations
State and local regulations in US
Tax regulations including OECD Pillar II global minimum tax
Recordkeeping requirements for business communications
Climate-related disclosure requirements
Sustainability reporting requirements

sanction_risks: US economic sanctions targeting Chinese persons
Russia sanctions including Russia-Ukraine military conflict
China blocking statute creating conflicts of law
Risk of being unable to operate in certain jurisdictions due to conflicting laws
